page: Microsoft Azure M96s_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 server family. Built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel processors, this instance provides 96 dedicated virtual CPUs. It is deployed on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring isolated and dedicated compute resources for demanding enterprise workloads.

The server features 974.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of approximately 10.15 GB of RAM per virtual core. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. The instance is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disk options to handle intensive input and output operations.

With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network configurations must be managed through Azure's virtual network infrastructure. The high memory-to-CPU ratio makes this server type suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise resource planning applications that require massive RAM capacity without dedicated local storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure M96s_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 architecture server features 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 974.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory allocation of 10.15 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes. It contains no onboard GPUs and includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is engineered for memory-heavy workloads, such as large relational databases, in-memory data analytics, and enterprise-grade applications requiring substantial memory capacity and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96s_1_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 974.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability without local disk storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and nearly one terabyte of RAM for enterprise database workloads.
